body.title: D-palace-source-of-truth-2026-04-20
body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-palace-source-of-truth-2026-04-20

**Closed at:** 2026-04-20T20:26:29.013231+00:00
**Ticket count:** 9 (all closed)

## Shipped via
- T-export-chat-skill (S) — /export-chat skill — dump today's CC chat log to /home/akien/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs/YYYYMMDD.md  `done` — lab/claudecode/export_chat.py renders transcripts to claude_chat_logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Supports --all (bulk), --session <id>, --dry-run. Elides tool results to 200 chars for readability. SKILL.md wired 
- T-palace-as-source-of-truth (L) — Memory palace as source of truth — tickets/decisions/slates/rules/skills/history all live in theigors/* tree  `done` — Shape-lock doc: lab/design_docs/palace_migration/shape_lock_2026-04-20.md. Two-layer model (canonical in memories table as first-class rows w/ parent=*_ROOT under PR_IGORS_PROJECT; navigable index in 
- T-chat-history-igor-backfill (M) — Igor background job: convert older chat logs into /home/akien/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs/  `done` — Registered StaleChatLogBackfiller push source to run export_chat.py --all hourly as background job
- T-tickets-into-palace-subtree (L) — Tickets migrate from queue.json → memories table as canonical (theigors/tickets palace echo)  `done` — Migrated 698 tickets from queue.json → clan.memories (FACTUAL rows under TICKETS_ROOT, metadata.kind=ticket). cc_queue.py now reads/writes DB as canonical; queue.json is regenerated as echo on every s
- T-slates-into-palace-subtree (S) — Slates migrate into memory graph (theigors/slates/YYYYMMDD palace echo)  `done` — Migrated 18 slate files to clan.memories as REFERENCE rows under SLATES_ROOT. Palace pointers at theigors/slates/YYYYMMDD. Metadata.sections parsed best-effort from ## headers. Text files remain hand-
- T-skills-into-palace-subtree (M) — Skills into memory graph (theigors/skills palace echo) — kills the ~/.claude/skills + lab/claudecode/cc_skills + ClaudeAndAkien drift  `done` — Migrated 19 active skills to clan.memories as PROCEDURAL rows under SKILLS_ROOT. Palace pointers at theigors/skills/<name>. Synced active → cc_skills (8 drifted updated, 2 new created) so cc_skills st
- T-decisions-into-palace-subtree (M) — Decisions migrate into memory graph (theigors/decisions palace echo)  `done` — Migrated 352 numbered D### decisions from decisions_log.dsb + 3 slug-style decisions (D-palace-source-of-truth, D-workflow-overhaul, D-workshop-evolution) synthesized from ticket backlinks to clan.mem
- T-sync-on-close-not-dayend (S) — Echo timing: sync palace → files + GitHub on ticket close, not at day's end  `done` — Extended cc_queue.py cmd_done with _append_to_todays_slate helper: appends closed ticket to today's ## Done today section (idempotent, graceful-degrade). Combined with pre-existing queue.json echo reg
- T-rules-canonical-db-first (M) — Rules canonical source: DB (palace) first, CLAUDE.md becomes thin shim  `done` — theigors/rules/* seeded (11 nodes: persona, coding, commits, memory, database, budget, collaboration, igor-constraints, docs-live-in-code, do-not + parent). CLAUDE.md rewritten as ~80-line shim (boots

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: unknown.
